title: SAGES Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 57 Teacher, Computer Teacher and More Posts
organization: District Education Officer & Secretary, Swami Atmanand Utkrisht Vidyalaya Prabandhan Samiti, Balodabazar-Bhatapara (C.G.)
post_name: Lecturer, Teacher, PT Teacher, Computer Teacher, Assistant Teacher, Lab Assistant Teacher, Librarian, Head Teacher (Primary)
short_info: District Education Officer & Secretary, Swami Atmanand Utkrisht Vidyalaya Prabandhan Samiti, Balodabazar-Bhatapara (C.G.) (SEJES) Teaching and Non-Teaching Notification 2026 has been released on 27-05-2026 on the official website https://balodabazar.gov.in. A total of 57 vacancies have been announced through the SEJES Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.document verification: To be notified after merit list
important_dates.appointment: Subject to document verification and medical fitness

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the notification. Applications are to be submitted via Google Form free of charge.

age_limit.details: Candidates must have completed a minimum of 21 years of age and must not have crossed 35 years of age as on 01/01/2026.

qualification.domicile: Indian Citizen; must be a native resident of Chhattisgarh (domicile certificate from competent authority required)
qualification.education_qualification: As per post (see post-wise details below)
qualification.details: All educational qualifications must be completed by the application date. Only Indian citizens who are domiciled in Chhattisgarh are eligible. Candidates must not currently be serving as a contractual employee in SEJES at an equivalent post (they may apply for higher posts only).

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 25,300/- to Rs. 38,100/- per month (lump sum, no other allowances)

how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only via the Google Form link. No offline/postal applications will be accepted.
Google Form Link: https://forms.gle/YrPT9FToRFFKYi1a7 Application Window: 28/05/2026 to 15/06/2026 (12:00 noon sharp) Official Website for Notification: https://balodabazar.gov.in/
important_instructions: Only one application per candidate. In case of multiple applications, the first application will be considered valid. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered under any circumstances. Candidates must appear at document verification with all original certificates and self-attested copies. Caste certificate (SC/ST/OBC) must be issued by competent authority in prescribed Government of India format. Domicile/nativity certificate of Chhattisgarh is mandatory. Medical fitness certificate from government medical board must be submitted within 7 days of joining.
